Name: Man Of War
Description: Don't be fooled by that purple light and get close to it. It’s not a single creature, but a whole colony of horrors disguised as a jellyfish. Its tentacles can extend long and hidden in the waves, with a sting that will make a grown man wish he had stayed on the pier. It sails the winds using a gas-filled float, which means it goes wherever the ocean's mood takes it.
